subcodes.first_line: The pens of earth are powerless to describe His divine forgiveness, and the tongues of all the world's inhabitants cannot recount His all-encompassing grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عفو الهی را اقلام ارض از عهده وصف برنیاید و عنایت محیطه اش را لسان اهل عالم
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
